title: Add assignment type checking for arrays

features.name: unpacked array to scalar output assignment
features.description: Code should include a large unpacked array (reg array [255:0]) being assigned to a scalar output port where type mismatch occurs

features.name: large unpacked array to packed type assignment
features.description: Code should include assigning an unpacked array with 256 elements to a type that cannot hold it, causing VlUnpacked<CData, 256> to CData assignment error
